understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without dying, completing BP35 and continuing through subsequent levels until the game is won, within the per-attempt (50 turns) and per-level (2 attempts) limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), reaches the goal `+`, or hits a hazard. Landing on spikes (`u`/`v`) immediately ends the attempt. CLICK can be used on specific tiles (notably breakable blocks `x`) to remove/open paths; CLICK does not count as a horizontal move for timers like moving platforms when present. UNDO reverses the previous action to recover from a mistaken move/click. Planning relies on the structured state previews (left/right landing and corridor scan) to choose safe landings and prioritize passage columns that change vertical section.
